what: Neural pipeline scored on the PapyGreek documentary-Koine dependency fold (first documentary-Greek parsing evaluation).
protocol: greek.use_neural_pipeline(); greek.evaluate_on_papygreek(); CPU sequential (canonical); gold tokenization; official CoNLL-2018 evaluator; fold = papygreek-fold-v1 (sha 29bc27b6...), leakage-checked vs the grc-joint training set (354 overlapping sentences excluded via Pedalion's papyri subset)
batching_note: batch-32 is NOT prediction-identical on this fold (~0.02% of decisions flip: float non-associativity under padded batching; 0 UPOS diffs, single-digit head/lemma/feats flips) — sequential is canonical; the full-fold identity check FAILED here, unlike UD-Perseus, so batching stays off this pin per the standing rule
verification: the pinned numbers reproduce to full precision through the hosted asset (run twice: builder's local fold and the fetched papygreek-fold-v1)
